Spells-Bard — Male Human Bard: 10
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 7 (-2) Constitution: 14 (+2) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 11 (+0)
Background: Soldier Alignment: Neutral Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma; Constitution; Intelligence; Wisdom Experience: 71475/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 4 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Bard (Bard Subclass)
Feats: Alert; Grappler; Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Bard Features: Armor Training (Light); Bard Subclass; Bardic Inspiration; Bonus Proficiencies (College Of Lore); College Of Lore; Countercharm; Cutting Words; Expertise; Font Of Inspiration; Jack Of All Trades; Magical Discoveries; Magical Secrets; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from any); Spellcasting; Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any Musical Instrument); Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Soldier Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Strength, Dexterity, Constitution); Savage Attacker; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Intimidation); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Gaming Set)
Feature Notes:
Bard Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +6 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +8
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +5 Medicine: (wis) +4 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +9 Stealth: (dex) +6
History: (int) +5 Perception: (wis) +6 Survival: (wis) +4
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Athletics; History; Insight; Intimidation; Nature; Perception; Performance; Religion; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Expertise: Acrobatics; Nature; Performance; Stealth
Tool Proficiency: Dulcimer: (cha); Lute: (cha); Three-Dragon Ante Set: (wis); Viol: (cha)
Languages: Common; Gnomish; Sylvan
Skill Notes:
Bonus Proficiencies (College Of Lore): Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Expertise: Has expertise in 4 chosen proficient skills
Jack Of All Trades: +2 on non-proficient skill checks
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Combat
Hit Points: 55 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 10
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: Studded Leather Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+5 1d4+1 P R20/60; Nick); Greatclub (+5 1d8+1 B; Push); Sickle (+5 1d4+1 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+5 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +4 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: -2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: -2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: -2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Bardic Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action once per short rest to give an ally +1d10 on an ability check, attack, or save within 1 hr
Countercharm: R30' Can use a reaction to give a target a reroll with advantage on a save vs. charmed or frightened
Cutting Words: R60' Can use a reaction to subtract a Bardic Inspiration die from a foe roll
Font Of Inspiration: Bardic Inspiration refreshes after a short rest
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Dexterity
Save: Charisma: +4; Constitution: +2; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +2
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: B0: 4; B: 15 Spell Slots: B1: 4; B2: 3; B3: 3; B4: 3; B5: 2 Attack: B: +4 Spell DC: B: 12
Spells:
Aid (B2 Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 hit points]
Animal Friendship (B1 Ench): R30' Charms a target beast (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Animal Messenger (B2 Ench): R30' Tiny beast target moves to deliver a 25-word message to a described recipient (save Charisma negates; CR greater than 0 automatically succeeds) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration +48 hr] [R]
Animate Objects (B5 Tran): R120' 0 Medium (10 hit points; Armor Class 15; +0 attack inflicts 1d4+3 force), 0 Large (20 hit points; Armor Class 15; +0 attack inflicts 2d6+3 HP), or 0 Huge (40 hit points, Armor Class 15; +0 attack inflicts 2d12+3 HP) objects obey mental commands when within 500' for concentration up to 1 min [+Level Medium objects inflict +1d4 HP, Large +1d6 HP, or Huge +1d12 HP]
Antipathy/Sympathy (B8 Ench): R60' Target creature or object charms or frightens a specified creature type within 120' (save Wisdom negates; additional saves when no longer within 120' end and give immunity for 1 min) for 10 days
Arcane Sword (B7 Evoc): 1
Awaken (B5 Tran): Touched beast or plant gains Intelligence 10, speech, and movement and becomes charmed for 30 days or until harmed
Bane (B1 Ench): R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saves (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Befuddlement (B8 Ench): R150' Target suffers 10d6 HP psychic and loss of spells and Magic actions (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Bestow Curse (B3 Necr): Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action other than Dodge, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanent at level 4, 5, 7, or 9; levels above 4 require no concentration]
Blindness/Deafness (B2 Tran): R120' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Calm Emotions (B2 Ench): R60' 20' radius suppresses a choice of charmed and frightened or hostility (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Charm Monster (B4 Ench): R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Person (B1 Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Clairvoyance (B3 Divi): R1 mile Self can choose each rd to see or hear via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Color Spray (B1 Illu): 15' cone blinds (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Command (B1 Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Comprehend Languages (B1 Divi): Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Compulsion (B4 Ench): R30' Self controls targets' movement direction (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Confusion (B4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Cure Wounds (B1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+0 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Dancing Lights (B0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Detect Magic (B1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Thoughts (B2 Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Dimension Door (B4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (B1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Dispel Magic (B3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dissonant Whispers (B1 Ench): R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and forces the target to use its reaction to flee (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Dominate Monster (B8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Person (B5 Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Dream (B5 Illu): Touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates)
Enhance Ability (B2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enlarge/Reduce (B2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Enthrall (B2 Ench): R60' Target suffers -10 Perception (save Wisdom negates; targets in battle automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min
Etherealness (B7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Eyebite (B6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Faerie Fire (B1 Evoc): R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (B3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (B1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Find The Path (B6 Divi): Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Forcecage (B7 Evoc): R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Foresight (B9 Divi): Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr
Freedom Of Movement (B4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Geas (B5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Glibness (B8 Ench): Self can take 15 on Charisma checks and always detects as truthful for 1 hr
Glyph Of Warding (B3 Abju): When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1]
Greater Invisibility (B4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Restoration (B5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Guards And Wards (B6 Abju): Multiple magic effects protect 2,500 sq ft for 24 hr
Hallucinatory Terrain (B4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Healing Word (B1 Abju): R60' Target regains 2d4+0 hit points [+Level restores +2d4 hit points]
Heat Metal (B2 Tran): R60' Touching the target metal inflicts 2d8 HP fire, plus attack and ability disadvantage if the the target is worn or held (save Constitution negates disadvantage), for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to repeat the initial damage [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Heroes' Feast (B6 Conj): 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Heroism (B1 Ench): Touched gains immunity to becoming frightened and +0 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hideous Laughter (B1 Ench): 1
Hold Monster (B5 Ench): R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hold Person (B2 Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hypnotic Pattern (B3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Identify (B1 Divi): Touch reveals the magic properties of an item or the spells affecting a creature [R]
Illusory Script (B1 Illu): Alters the appearance of self writing on the target material, making its meaning clear only to specified creatures and those with truesight, for 10 days [R]
Invisibility (B2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Irresistible Dance (B6 Ench): 1
Knock (B2 Tran): R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Legend Lore (B5 Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Lesser Restoration (B2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Light (B0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Locate Animals Or Plants (B2 Divi): Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Creature (B4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (B2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Longstrider (B1 Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Mage Hand (B0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Mouth (B2 Illu): R30' Target object speaks a 25-word message when triggered [R]
Magnificent Mansion (B7 Conj): 1
Major Image (B3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Mass Cure Wounds (B5 Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+0 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Healing Word (B3 Abju): R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+0 HP [+Level restores +1d4 HP]
Mass Suggestion (B6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or any ally ends the effects [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Mending (B0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Message (B0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Mind Blank (B8 Abju): Touched gains immunity to psychic damage, emotion and thought detection, divination, and charm for 24 hr
Minor Illusion (B0 Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Mirage Arcane (B7 Illu): Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Mirror Image (B2 Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mislead (B5 Illu): Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Modify Memory (B5 Ench): R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; a target in battle has advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell [+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Nondetection (B3 Abju): Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Phantasmal Force (B2 Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Killer (B4 Illu): R120' Target perceives a personal horror that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks and 4d10 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Planar Binding (B5 Abju): R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Plant Growth (B3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days
Polymorph (B4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast, with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Power Word Heal (B9 Ench): R60' Target regains all hit points, recovers from charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned, and can use a reaction to stand from prone
Power Word Kill (B9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Stun (B8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Prestidigitation (B0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prismatic Spray (B7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Prismatic Wall (B9 Abju): R60' 90'x30'x1" wall or 15' radius sphere emits 100' bright light and blinds for 1 min non-designated creatures within 20' (save Constitution negates) for 10 min; creatures passing through suffer 12d6 HP each fire, acid, lightning, poison, and cold (save Dexterity half), restraint (save Dexterity negates) and petrification after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates), and blindness (save Dexterity negates) and banishment to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn
Programmed Illusion (B6 Illu): R120' Creates a 30' cube illusion when triggered (Investigation detects), with a 10 min pause between triggers
Project Image (B7 Illu): R500 miles Self can see, hear, and speak through an illusory double (Investigation detects) created in a familiar place for concentration up to 1 day or until it suffers damage
Raise Dead (B5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Regenerate (B7 Tran): Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Resurrection (B7 Necr): Restores life with full hit points to and removes poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 365 days or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Scrying (B5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
See Invisibility (B2 Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Seeming (B5 Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Sending (B3 Evoc): Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Shatter (B2 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Silence (B2 Illu): R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Silent Image (B1 Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Sleep (B1 Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking awakens)
Slow (B3 Tran): R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Speak With Animals (B1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Dead (B3 Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Plants (B3 Tran): Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius for 10 min
Starry Wisp (B0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP radiant and a dim glow until the end of the next turn
Stinking Cloud (B3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Suggestion (B2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Symbol (B7 Abju): Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or harmed (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Telepathic Bond (B5 Divi): 1
Teleport (B7 Conj): R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleportation Circle (B5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Thunderwave (B1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Tiny Hut (B3 Evoc): 1
Tongues (B3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
True Polymorph (B9 Tran): R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Seeing (B6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Strike (B0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +4 attack bonus and inflicts +1d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Unseen Servant (B1 Conj): R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Vicious Mockery (B0 Ench): R60' Target suffers 2d6 HP psychic and disadvantage on its next attack before the end of its next turn (save Wisdom negates)
Zone Of Truth (B2 Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Font Of Inspiration: Can expend a spell slot to regain 1 Bardic Inspiration use
Magical Discoveries: Can learn 2 additional spells from the Cleric, Druid, and Wizard spell lists
Magical Secrets: Can learn spells from the Cleric, Druid, and Wizard spell lists
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the bard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
